server/tests/test_cli.py :: test_cli_convert_png_to_jpg
def test_cli_convert_png_to_jpg(tmp_path: Path) -> None:
    source = tmp_path / "input.png"
    source.write_bytes(png_bytes(solid_raster(16, 16, 200, 50, 50)))
    output = tmp_path / "output.jpg"
    code = main(["convert", str(source), "-o", str(output), "-f", "jpg", "--max-mb", "2"])
    assert code == 0
    assert output.read_bytes().startswith(b"\xFF\xD8")

server/tests/test_cli.py :: test_cli_convert_with_preset
def test_cli_convert_with_preset(tmp_path: Path) -> None:
    source = tmp_path / "input.png"
    source.write_bytes(png_bytes(gradient_raster(40, 30)))
    output = tmp_path / "output.jpg"
    code = main(["convert", str(source), "-o", str(output), "--preset", "email"])
    assert code == 0
    assert output.read_bytes().startswith(b"\xFF\xD8")

server/tests/test_cli.py :: test_cli_compare_command
def test_cli_compare_command(tmp_path: Path) -> None:
    left = tmp_path / "left.png"
    right = tmp_path / "right.png"
    left.write_bytes(png_bytes(solid_raster(10, 10, 100, 50, 50)))
    right.write_bytes(png_bytes(solid_raster(10, 10, 100, 50, 50)))
    assert main(["compare", str(left), str(right)]) == 0

server/tests/test_cli.py :: test_cli_presets_command
def test_cli_presets_command() -> None:
    import contextlib
    import io

    buffer = io.StringIO()
    with contextlib.redirect_stdout(buffer):
        code = main(["presets"])
    assert code == 0
    assert "web" in buffer.getvalue()

def test_cli_convert_bmp_input(tmp_path: Path) -> None:
    source = tmp_path / "input.bmp"

    code = main(["convert", str(source), "-o", str(output), "-f", "jpg"])

server/tests/test_cli.py :: test_cli_convert_to_gif
def test_cli_convert_to_gif(tmp_path: Path) -> None:
    source = tmp_path / "gradient.png"
    source.write_bytes(png_bytes(gradient_raster(24, 18)))
    output = tmp_path / "output.gif"
    code = main(["convert", str(source), "-o", str(output), "-f", "gif", "--max-mb", "2"])
    assert code == 0
    assert output.read_bytes().startswith(b"GIF89a")

server/tests/test_cli.py :: test_cli_analyze_json
def test_cli_analyze_json(tmp_path: Path) -> None:
    source = tmp_path / "photo.png"
    source.write_bytes(png_bytes(solid_raster(20, 12, 10, 120, 200)))
    import contextlib
    import io

    buffer = io.StringIO()
    with contextlib.redirect_stdout(buffer):
        code = main(["analyze", str(source), "--json"])
    assert code == 0
    payload = json.loads(buffer.getvalue())
    assert payload["width"] == 20
    assert payload["height"] == 12
    assert payload["format"] == "png"

server/tests/test_cli.py :: test_cli_batch_directory
def test_cli_batch_directory(tmp_path: Path) -> None:
    inputs = tmp_path / "inputs"
    outputs = tmp_path / "outputs"
    inputs.mkdir()
    (inputs / "a.png").write_bytes(png_bytes(solid_raster(10, 10, 255, 0, 0)))
    (inputs / "b.png").write_bytes(png_bytes(solid_raster(12, 12, 0, 255, 0)))
    code = main(["batch", str(inputs), "-o", str(outputs), "-f", "jpg", "--max-mb", "1"])
    assert code == 0
    produced = sorted(path.name for path in outputs.iterdir())
    assert produced == ["a.jpg", "b.jpg"]

server/tests/test_cli.py :: test_cli_convert_gif_input
def test_cli_convert_gif_input(tmp_path: Path) -> None:
    gif_source = convert_raster(
        gradient_raster(18, 14),
        OutputFormat("image/gif", "gif"),
        max_mb=2,
    )
    source = tmp_path / "input.gif"
    source.write_bytes(gif_source)
    output = tmp_path / "output.jpg"
    code = main(["convert", str(source), "-o", str(output), "-f", "jpg", "--max-mb", "1"])
    assert code == 0
    assert output.read_bytes().startswith(b"\xFF\xD8")

server/tests/test_cli.py :: test_cli_analyze_jpeg
def test_cli_analyze_jpeg(tmp_path: Path) -> None:
    source = tmp_path / "photo.jpg"
    source.write_bytes(jpeg_bytes(solid_raster(14, 14, 30, 60, 90), quality=85))
    import io
    import contextlib

    buffer = io.StringIO()
    with contextlib.redirect_stdout(buffer):
        code = main(["analyze", str(source)])
    assert code == 0
    assert "JPEG" in buffer.getvalue()

server/tests/test_cli.py :: test_cli_convert_missing_input
def test_cli_convert_missing_input(tmp_path: Path) -> None:
    missing = tmp_path / "missing.png"
    code = main(["convert", str(missing), "-f", "png"])
    assert code != 0

server/tests/test_cli.py :: test_cli_batch_empty_directory
def test_cli_batch_empty_directory(tmp_path: Path) -> None:
    empty = tmp_path / "empty"
    empty.mkdir()
    outputs = tmp_path / "out"
    code = main(["batch", str(empty), "-o", str(outputs), "-f", "png"])
    assert code != 0
